closure_text: Process deviation from a missed cleaning step; 5S audit added to the shift changeover checklist.
Deviation attributed to calibration drift on gauge 43; recalibrated and verified against standard.
Deviation attributed to calibration drift on gauge 94; recalibrated and verified against standard.
Handling damage identified at packaging; foam insert redesigned and first-article re-approved.
Vendor CAPA referenced; corrective action verified on subsequent lots with no recurrence noted.
Investigation found an out-of-spec torque setting; work instruction WI-971 updated accordingly.
